_about: The complete decision policy for ClaimLens. Every monetary outcome the system can produce is determined by the numbers in this file. A business owner can change refund behaviour here without touching code or prompts, and nothing in the AI layer can override these values.
_confidence_threshold: Minimum vision-model confidence required to decide automatically. Below this the claim goes to a human. Raising this number makes the system more cautious.
_auto_approve_ceiling: Maximum item value the system may resolve without human sign-off. Any claim on an item worth more than this escalates regardless of how clear the damage is.
_fraud_watch_claim_count: Number of prior claims that triggers mandatory human review of this account.
_warranty_days: Days after delivery during which a claim is eligible, per product category.
_severity_thresholds: Severity 4-5 refunds in full. Severity 2-3 ships a replacement. Severity 1 is treated as cosmetic.
_cosmetic_partial_refund_rate: Goodwill credit for severity-1 cosmetic defects, as a fraction of item value.
